title: antirrhinum majus subvar. vulgare
intro: Antirrhinum majus subvar. vulgare, commonly known as the common snapdragon or garden snapdragon, is a plant species belonging to the snapdragon family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Antirrhinum majus subvar. vulgare include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in homeopathic remedies to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
